Definition (C:\Users\ahumeaub\Desktop\CLionProject\TestAffichageSynchrone\include\LibVLC\include\vlc\plugins\vlc_configuration.h)

  • Program Listing for File vlc_configuration.h

Detailed Description

This file describes the programming interface for the configuration module. It includes functions allowing to declare, get or set configuration options.

  • sys/types.h
